name: @ont/adapter-publisher
description: ONT B4 adapter — the publisher write-side. Assembles the RootAnchor / claim transactions the publisher broadcasts, as pure LegacyTransaction structures. A write-side adapter validates no untrusted input; its bar is the WRITE→READ round-trip (the assembled tx is accepted by the audited read-side). Signing / PSBT / broadcast are I/O at the edge or B5 wallet-handoff.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/claim-path && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-indexer && vitest run
